bundle_source_of_truth.approach: B — Parse environment.yml at build start; synthesize CONDA_PACKAGES
bundle_source_of_truth.file_layout: tools/linux-build/environment.yml (dedicated build env, separate from any dev env)
bundle_source_of_truth.musicstreamer_install: pip install --no-deps . into bundled env after plugin-conda finishes

smoke_test_surface.codec_sweep: MP3 + AAC + AACP + PLS-resolved (full sweep across 3 distros)
smoke_test_surface.pls_handling: smoke_test.py imports musicstreamer.url_helpers and calls the production resolver
smoke_test_surface.playback_duration: 35s per URL (spike default); total UAT ~7 min for 4 URLs × 3 distros
smoke_test_surface.rationale: Exercises production resolver code path; catches dependency-graph / import issues that GStreamer-only smoke would miss

scope_boundaries.signing: GPG-sign the AppImage in build.sh (linuxdeploy --sign + sidecar .sig); GPG_KEY_ID env var; CI key via secrets.LINUX_SIGNING_KEY / LINUX_SIGNING_KEY_ID; adds new PKG-LIN-APP-10 requirement
scope_boundaries.zsync_url: Embed 'gh-releases-zsync|kcreasey|MusicStreamer|latest|MusicStreamer-*-x86_64.AppImage.zsync' (satisfies PKG-LIN-APP-06; serving infra deferred per PKG-LIN-APP-UPDATE)
scope_boundaries.ci_scope: Hybrid scaffold — .github/workflows/linux-appimage.yml workflow_dispatch only; no auto-publish; single-distro (Ubuntu 22.04) parity check, distrobox sweep stays on dev rig

canonical_refs: tools/check_bundle_plugins.py (Windows analog for Linux drift-guard mirror)
